commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a typed `full | slim` QA evidence mode, defaults the `smoke-ci` taxonomy profile to slim evidence, threads an override through QA profile/suite execution, and updates related docs and tests.

PR surface: Source +128, Tests +113, Docs +3, Other +1. Total +245 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a QA-lab artifact mode and CLI/taxonomy option rather than fixing a current-main bug. Source review traced the mode through CLI parsing, profile execution, suite evidence writing, scorecard attachment, merged suite evidence, docs, and tests.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review should decide whether the `smoke-ci` default artifact-shape change is acceptable; there is no narrow automation repair to queue.

target.title: Add slim evidence mode for QA profile evidence
target.body:
## Summary
- add taxonomy profile `evidenceMode: full | slim`, default to full, and set `smoke-ci` to slim
- emit top-level `evidenceMode` in `qa-evidence.json`; slim evidence omits per-entry `execution` metadata
- add `qa run --evidence-mode <full|slim>` for profile runs while keeping deprecated compact spellings as compatibility aliases
- keep the QA docs concise about slim evidence and how to override profile defaults

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/extension-runtime-dependencies.contract.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/whatsapp/cli.runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:extensions`
- `pnpm lint:extensions`
- `pnpm docs:list >/tmp/openclaw-docs-list.log && pnpm docs:check-mdx && pnpm format:docs:check`
- `git diff --check && pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/whatsapp/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-evidence.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-taxonomy.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-launch.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/test-file-scenario-runner.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
